invalidation.zh: 价格跌破85000（基于ATR和关键支撑）或资金费率Z-Score升至70%以上（显示多头过热），则平仓。
invalidation.en: Close position if price breaks below 85000 (based on ATR and key support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above 70% (indicating overheated longs).

invalidation.zh: 价格跌破120（基于ATR和近期低点）或资金费率Z-Score升至75%以上（显示多头过热），则平仓。
invalidation.en: Close position if price breaks below 120 (based on ATR and recent lows) or funding rate Z-Score rises above 75% (indicating overheated longs).
